betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Integrated & Military Grade Circuit Boards§f

§aThe two most important circuit boards — from mid-game automation to late-game weapons!§f

§bIntegrated Circuit Board§f: The first circuit requiring §bSilicon§f. Crafted in the §bSoldering Station§f (10s, 5kHE/s, 50kHE total). Used extensively in mid-game machines, automation, missiles, and tools like the Geiger counter.

§bRecipe§f:
§b• 4×§f Microchip + §b4×§f Printed Circuit Board + §b4×§f Lead Wire → §b1×§f Integrated Circuit Board

§bMilitary Grade Circuit Board§f: The first circuit to use a liquid — §bSulfuric Acid§f. Requires automated oil/chemical setups. Used in particle accelerators, nuclear warheads, and advanced reactor components.

§bRecipe§f:
§b• 4×§f Capacitor + §b16×§f Microchip + §b8×§f PCB + §b2×§f Rubber + §b8×§f Lead Wire + §e1,000mB§f Sulfuric Acid → §b1×§f Mil. Grade Board

§cDuration§f: 15s, 20kHE/s, 300kHE total

§eTip§f: The Military Grade Circuit Board is the most used circuit in the game. Set up automated Sulfuric Acid production before scaling up!
